caption: A video call interface displays a grid of twelve participants across four repeating sets of frames. The layout consists of three rows of four people. Notable participants include "Jerry Michalak," a man in a blue shirt and glasses; "Roland Sorensen," a man in a gray shirt; and "Daan," a woman in a black top. Other labels include "Susan Bucky," "Charles Mass," "Patrick Martyn," "Dirk Lajan," "Era_unstablebore," "Jim Burke," and "Jean-Jean van de Vyver." Some participants wear headsets, and one person's feed is replaced by a blue and white graphic of a stylized bird. Throughout the sequence, the participants remain in their respective frames, though some shift their posture or gaze slightly. The scene is static, representing a virtual meeting where the participants are seen in their home or office environments.
